360 Video Booth Rental for PEI Events

Nova Kingdom Rentals is a Bridgewater, Nova Scotia-based event rental company. Our 360 Video Booth is available for selected larger events on Prince Edward Island — including Charlottetown, Summerside, and surrounding communities. PEI bookings are accepted for festivals, corporate events, school events, fundraisers, and large celebrations where full travel, staffing, and logistics requirements can be arranged. Travel cost and logistics are quoted separately and confirmed before any booking is finalized. Travel and staffing quoted separately. Final availability confirmed manually.

Based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. PEI bookings are accepted for selected larger events. Travel, staffing, and logistics costs are quoted separately and confirmed before booking.

Featured Rentals

  • 360 Video Booth - Video Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Video Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Festivals and outdoor events
  • Corporate events and fundraisers
  • School events and grad parties
  • Weddings and large celebrations

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Nova Kingdom Rentals travel to PEI for 360 Video Booth rentals?
Yes, for selected larger events. We are based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia, and accept PEI bookings for festivals, corporate events, and larger community celebrations where travel and logistics are feasible. Travel cost and staffing are quoted separately.
How much does a 360 Video Booth rental cost for a PEI event?
The 360 Video Booth starts at $249 for 1 hour . For PEI events, travel cost, staffing, and logistics requirements are quoted separately based on your event location and needs. Contact us for a full PEI event quote.
What PEI communities do you serve for 360 Video Booth rentals?
We accept selected larger event bookings in Charlottetown, Summerside, and surrounding PEI communities. All PEI bookings are subject to availability, logistics confirmation, travel cost, and setup suitability.
Is an operator included with the 360 Video Booth rental?
Yes. An operator is included with every 360 Video Booth rental to run the platform and assist guests.
